# hellow-world-2

## Task

1. Clone this repository:
   ```bash
   git clone https://github.com/large-scale-ml-course-labs/hellow-world-2.git
   cd hellow-world-2
   ```
2. Open `print.py` and replace `# your code here` so that the program prints
   exactly:
   ```
   hellow world 2
   ```
   i.e. `print("hellow world 2")`.
3. Run it and save the output to `output.txt`:
   ```bash
   python print.py > output.txt
   ```
4. Create a branch, commit `output.txt`, push, and open a Pull Request:
   ```bash
   git checkout -b solution
   git add output.txt
   git commit -m "solution"
   git push -u origin solution
   ```
   Then open a PR on GitHub.

A GitHub Action will automatically check your `output.txt`. A green check ✅
means your answer is correct.
